about.title: About me
about.description: I am a Computer Engineering student at UDELAR with a deep passion for technology and cybersecurity. My technical journey is defined by hands-on experience in OSINT through the Trace Labs program and a Professional Pentest certification from Desec Security. As a freelance developer, I specialize in building secure, efficient digital solutions.</br>Beyond my technical practice, I am the founder of Elite Worldwide Holding, a technology-focused holding company where I oversee the strategic development and scaling of a diverse digital ecosystem. Through EWH, I am dedicated to driving innovation and delivering sustainable value across our ventures.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Development of modern, responsive, and fast websites. I also fix bugs and optimize existing pages.

services.title: Cybersecurity
services.description: Identification and analysis of security vulnerabilities in websites and systems.

services.title: Scripts and Automation
services.description: Automation of tasks using custom scripts and helpful bots.

services.title: Data Extraction & Scraping
services.description: Automated collection of structured data from web sources, turning complex sites into clean, actionable formats (JSON, CSV, SQL).

portfolio.title: Elitic AI
portfolio.description: An intelligent reading companion that turns any URL, file, or text into a personalized learning experience with contextual definitions and automated flashcards.

portfolio.title: MiQueja
portfolio.description: A startup connecting consumers and companies in Uruguay via public feedback to drive transparency and build trust.

portfolio.title: Risk Management Dashboard
portfolio.description: Informative dashboard developed for a risk management company, aimed at providing real-time visibility into operational issues and travel delays.

portfolio.title: Detran RS | Vulnerability
portfolio.description: Discovered a vulnerability in the login page of a government system. The issue was responsibly disclosed to the appropriate security team and promptly fixed.

testimonials.name: Luxtel Internet
testimonials.text: Igor arrived recently, but he has already shown that he is very dedicated to his work that makes. There are those who say that he is also very curious, as he always goes in addition to developing your professional knowledge

testimonials.text: It´s very pleasure to meet you and know you today Igor! You did a very good job to your best knowledge and information they´d provided you. You´re a good, polite and gentle young man that caught my attention and respect for you!
